name: Chloro, Weaver of Whimsy and Vexations

bardic_inspiration.name: Bardic Inspiration
bardic_inspiration.description: Grant a creature an Inspiration die to add to ability check, attack, or save.

inventory.name: Courtier's Embroidered Silk Pouch
inventory.description: A small, exquisite silk pouch, adorned with intricate, albeit slightly chaotic, embroidery. It contains a collection of rare, vibrant dyes and threads, for when inspiration strikes or a 'fix' is needed.

inventory.name: Critique's Eyeglass
inventory.description: A finely crafted magnifying glass with an elven-silver frame, used for scrutinizing fabric weaves, identifying flaws, or simply observing the mundane world with a disdainful air.

chest.name: Gossamer Leafweave Ensemble
chest.description: A whimsical, pastel-colored outfit crafted from carefully enchanted leaves and petals, shimmering with faint magical energy. Despite its delicate appearance, it offers surprising protection and blends seamlessly with natural environments.

mainHand.name: Golden Thimble-Grip Needle-Rapier
mainHand.description: A massive, golden sewing needle, intricately filigreed, with its 'eye' forming the hilt. Perfectly balanced for a duelist, it strikes with a finesse that belies its size.

amulet.name: Beetle-Shell Brooch of Whimsy
amulet.description: A polished brooch made from an iridescent beetle shell, mirroring the colors of her shoulder companion. It hums with a faint, chaotic magic, a subtle nod to her wild magic surge incident.

features.name: Expertise
features.description: Double proficiency bonus for two chosen skill proficiencies.

features.name: Sneak Attack
features.description: Extra 1d6 damage once per turn with finesse/ranged weapons when you have advantage.

features.name: Thieves' Cant
features.description: A secret mix of dialect, jargon, and code.

features.name: Cunning Action
features.description: Dash, Disengage, or Hide as a bonus action.

features.name: Roguish Archetype
features.description: Choose a roguish archetype.

features.name: Fancy Footwork
features.description: When you make a melee attack against a creature, you don't provoke opportunity attacks from that creature for the rest of the turn, whether you hit or not.

features.name: Panache
features.description: At 3rd level, your charm becomes extraordinarily effective. As an action, you can make a Charisma (Persuasion) check contested by a creature's Wisdom (Insight) check. The creature can be hostile or friendly toward you. If you succeed on the check and the creature is hostile, it has disadvantage on attack rolls against targets other than you and can't make opportunity attacks against targets other than you. This effect lasts for 1 minute, until one of your companions attacks the target or affects it with a spell, or until you and the target are more than 60 feet apart. If you succeed on the check and the creature is not hostile, it is charmed by you for 1 minute. While charmed, it regards you as a friendly acquaintance. This effect ends if you or your companions do anything harmful to it.

features.name: Kissies
features.description: Charm !

features.name: Swashbuckler
features.description: Chosen Path at Rogue Level 3

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: You can cast bard spells using Charisma as your spellcasting ability.

features.name: Bardic Inspiration
features.description: Inspire others through stirring words or music. Uses = CHA mod per long rest.

features.name: Jack of All Trades
features.description: Add half proficiency bonus to non-proficient ability checks.

features.name: Song of Rest
features.description: Use soothing music during a short rest for extra healing (1d6).

features.name: Bard College
features.description: Choose your Bard College archetype.

features.name: Mantle of Inspiration
features.description: As a bonus action, expend Bardic Inspiration to grant up to 5 creatures within 60 feet temp HP equal to 2× your bard level. Each can use reaction to move without provoking.

modifiers.description: Bonus action: grant THP and free movement to allies

features.name: Enthralling Performance
features.description: After 1 minute of performing, charm creatures (WIS save). Charmed creatures idolize you for 1 hour.

features.name: Fey Mirth & Mayhem
features.description: You learn the minor illusion cantrip if you don't already know it. As a bonus action, you can expend one use of your Bardic Inspiration. When you do, choose one of the following effects: Momentary Mirage: You become invisible until the start of your next turn or until you attack or cast a spell, whichever comes first. Trouble Spot: Choose a 10-foot radius within 60 feet. Until the start of your next turn, this area counts as difficult terrain, and creatures within it have disadvantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks.

features.name: Temperamental Terrain
features.description: Your ability to shape the environment and manipulate emotions grows. When you use your Fey Mirth & Mayhem's "Trouble Spot" option, you can choose one additional 10-foot radius within 60 feet to create another Trouble Spot. Additionally, when a creature damages you, you can use your reaction to make it regret its action. The creature must make a Wisdom saving throw against your spell save DC. On a failed save, it is overcome with a sudden fit of indignation or fear, having disadvantage on attack rolls until the end of its next turn. You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum of one), and you regain all expended uses when you finish a long rest.

features.name: Mending Mind, Unravelling Thoughts
features.description: You gain proficiency with rapiers if you don't already have it. As a bonus action, you can empower your rapier with fey magic. For the next minute, when you hit a creature with this rapier, you can choose to deal an additional 2d6 psychic damage and impose disadvantage on the next Wisdom saving throw the creature makes before the end of its next turn. This bonus damage and effect can be applied only once per turn. You can use this feature a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, and you regain all expended uses on a long rest.

features.name: Fairy Godmother's Fury
features.description: As an action, you can conjure a localized storm of fey magic and elemental energy. For the next minute, a 30-foot radius cylinder, 40 feet high, appears centered on a point you choose within 120 feet. Within this cylinder: the area becomes lightly obscured by shimmering mist and dancing lights, and the ground is difficult terrain. At the start of each of your turns, you can choose one of the following effects to occur: Tempestuous Gust: Each creature of your choice within the cylinder must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be pushed 10 feet in a direction of your choice. Distracting Downpour: Each creature of your choice within the cylinder has disadvantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks until the start of your next turn. Glimmering Barrage: You can choose one creature within the cylinder to take 4d6 psychic damage as spectral motes assail its mind. You can use this feature once, and you regain the ability to do so after a long rest.

features.name: College of Glamour
features.description: Chosen Path at Bard Level 3

personalityTraits: I see the prime material plane as a poorly decorated, drafty dimension, full of systematic flaws that beg to be 're-accessorized'.
ideals: Aesthetics. The pursuit of ultimate beauty and the perfect textile is the only truly worthy endeavor. Flaws are an abomination.
bonds: My banishment from the Court of Gossamer & Gale is a temporary inconvenience. I will return, adorned in the legendary Golden Fleece, and they will be forced to acknowledge my superior taste.
flaws: My vanity is legendary; I cannot abide criticism of my fashion or methods and will go to extreme, often chaotic, lengths to prove my discerning eye and artistic genius.

logbook.description: Leveled up to 6 (Bard)! Max HP increased by 9.
Leveled up to 5 (Bard)! Max HP increased by 6.
Leveled up to 4 (Bard)! Max HP increased by 9.
Leveled up to 3 (Rogue)! Max HP increased by 9.
Leveled up to 2 (Rogue)! Max HP increased by 9.
Rolled Constitution Check: 4 (1d20) + 1 = 5
Chloro, Weaver of Whimsy and Vexations was born. A Level 1 Gnome Rogue, Charlatan background.

name: Sylas Gloomleaf

wild_shape.name: Wild Shape
wild_shape.description: Magically assume the shape of a beast.

customSpells.name: Gloom Blossom
customSpells.description: You cause a patch of dark, thorny fungal growth to erupt from a surface within range. This patch, 5 feet in diameter, counts as difficult terrain. Any creature that starts its turn in the patch or enters it for the first time on a turn takes 1d4 piercing damage. The patch also emits dim light in a 5-foot radius. The damage increases by 1d4 when you reach 5th level (2d4), 11th level (3d4), and 17th level (4d4).

customSpells.name: Subterranean Hum
customSpells.description: You attune your senses to the vibrations of the earth. For the duration, you have tremorsense out to 10 feet, allowing you to detect and pinpoint the origin of vibrations in the ground, and allowing you to automatically detect the location of anything moving on the ground within that range, provided you aren't deafened. You also gain advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks made to hear movement through stone, earth, or plant matter within 30 feet.

customSpells.name: Whispering Mycelial Veil
customSpells.components: V, S, M (a piece of dried mushroom)
customSpells.description: You conjure a shimmering, translucent veil of interconnected fungal threads that stretches between two points you can see within range, up to 20 feet long and 5 feet high. The veil provides lightly obscured area to creatures attempting to see through it. Any creature passing through the veil without speaking a secret passphrase you create when casting the spell triggers a faint, echoing whisper of primeval warnings, alerting you and any chosen allies within 60 feet. The veil is impervious to non-magical plant damage and can only be dispelled by magic or 10 points of fire damage.

inventory.name: Bioluminescent Moss Jar
inventory.description: A small, stoppered jar filled with clumps of glowing, phosphorescent moss harvested from the deepest caves. It emits a soft, unearthly dim light in a 10-foot radius, just enough to navigate by in the darkest environments without drawing much attention.

inventory.name: Pouch of Petals and Poison-Ivy
inventory.description: A small, stained leather pouch containing an eclectic mix of dried, dark-hued flower petals, thorny vines, and carefully preserved leaves of highly toxic plants, all gathered from the Underdark's forgotten corners. Useful for spell components or brewing noxious concoctions.

chest.name: Twilight Fungal Weave Robes
chest.description: Loose, flowing robes woven from stiff, dried fungal filaments and bark strips, dyed in deep purples and greys. They are surprisingly resistant and provide mild protection, offering insulation against both heat and cold, and a slight camouflaging effect in dim light.

mainHand.name: Gnarled Thornwood Staff
mainHand.description: A staff made from dark, twisted thornwood, its surface rough and covered in tiny, sharp nubs. It feels unnaturally cold to the touch, and faint purple fungi grow in its crevices, offering a dim, internal luminescence in the dark.

offHand.name: Obsidian Ritual Dagger
offHand.description: A jagged dagger carved from a single piece of dark, volcanic obsidian. Though not crafted for combat, its razor-sharp edge makes it useful for gathering rare reagents and drawing blood in ancient, forgotten rites.

features.name: Druidic
features.description: You know Druidic, the secret language of druids.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: Cast druid spells using Wisdom.

features.name: Wild Shape
features.description: Magically assume the shape of a beast you have seen before.

features.name: Druid Circle
features.description: Choose a Druid Circle archetype.

features.name: Combat Wild Shape
features.description: Wild Shape as a bonus action, and expend spell slots to heal 1d8 per level while in beast form.

modifiers.description: Bonus action Wild Shape. Bonus action heal while shifted.

features.name: Circle Forms
features.description: Wild Shape into more dangerous beasts (CR 1). Scales with level.

features.name: Circle of the Moon
features.description: Chosen Path at Druid Level 2

personalityTraits: Speaks in hushed, resonant tones, often addressing plants or unseen spirits before actual people, viewing the world through the slow, cyclical lens of nature rather than the fleeting concerns of mortals.
ideals: Balance (Neutral): The wild is a force of brutal beauty, neither good nor evil, but a necessary cycle of growth and decay. My purpose is to maintain its precarious equilibrium, even if it demands grim choices.
bonds: The ancient, multi-trunked 'Weeping Heart' tree in the Twilight Mire, a place of profound sorrow and potent magic, is my sanctuary and my anchor to this world. Its deep roots hold secrets I am sworn to protect.
flaws: Deep-seated paranoia of exposure; I instinctively recoil from direct sunlight and the bustling presence of too many surface dwellers, fearing both their judgment and their destructive potential. I have a secret fear that Lolth's whispers might one day find even me, far from the Underdark.

logbook.description: Leveled up to 4 (Druid)! Max HP increased by 7.
Leveled up to 3 (Druid)! Max HP increased by 7.
Leveled up to 2 (Druid)! Max HP increased by 7.
Sylas Gloomleaf was born. A Level 1 Elf Druid, Hermit background.

name: Xylos, The Rooted Shadow

channel_divinity.name: Channel Divinity
channel_divinity.description: Channel divine power for domain-specific effects.

lay_on_hands.name: Lay on Hands
lay_on_hands.description: Heal with a touch from a pool of HP.

customSpells.name: Venomous Touch
customSpells.description: You imbue your touch with the chilling venom of the Underdark. Make a melee spell attack against one creature within your reach. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 poison damage and must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the end of its next turn.

customSpells.name: Grasping Thorns
customSpells.components: V, S, M (a thorn or a piece of dry vine)
customSpells.description: Thick, thorny vines erupt from the ground in a 10-foot radius centered on a point you choose within range. The area becomes difficult terrain. When a creature enters the area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it must succeed on a Strength saving throw or take 1d6 piercing damage and be restrained until the spell ends. A creature restrained by the thorns can use its action to make a Strength check against your spell save DC, freeing itself on a success.

customSpells.name: Shadow Veil
customSpells.description: You cloak yourself in shifting, inky shadows, making your form indistinct. Until the spell ends, attack rolls against you have disadvantage if the attacker relies on sight. This spell ends early if you take damage from a creature or if you enter an area of bright light.

inventory.name: Underdark Survival Kit
inventory.description: A collection of fungi-based rations, glowing lichen for light, a spool of fine, strong spider silk, and a small, sharp bone dagger. Essential for surviving the unknown.

chest.name: Moss-Laced Hide Armor
chest.description: Armor crafted from cured beast hides, interwoven with living moss and reinforced with fragments of petrified wood. It offers protection while allowing for silent movement through dense foliage.

mainHand.name: Obsidian-Edged Glaive
mainHand.description: A long haft of dark, treated wood topped with a cruel, polished obsidian blade, wickedly sharp. It hums faintly with an unseen current.

amulet.name: Petrified Spider Amulet
amulet.description: A small, smooth, dark stone carved in the likeness of a petrified spider. It feels cold to the touch and occasionally seems to pulse with a faint, internal light.

features.name: Divine Sense
features.description: Detect celestials, fiends, and undead within 60 ft.

features.name: Lay on Hands
features.description: A pool of healing power. Pool = 5 × paladin level.

features.name: Fighting Style
features.description: Adopt a particular style of fighting.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: Cast paladin spells using Charisma.

features.name: Divine Smite
features.description: Expend spell slot to deal extra 2d8 radiant damage on a hit.

features.name: Sacred Oath
features.description: Choose a sacred oath archetype.

features.name: Oath of Devotion Spells
features.description: You gain oath spells at the paladin levels listed. 3rd Level: Protection from Evil and Good, Sanctuary.

features.name: Channel Divinity: Sacred Weapon
features.description: As a bonus action, you can imbue one weapon that you are holding with positive energy, using your Channel Divinity. For 1 minute, you add your Charisma modifier to the attack rolls made with that weapon (minimum of +1). The weapon also emits bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet. If the weapon is not already magical, it becomes magical for the duration. You can end this effect on your turn as part of any other action. If you are no longer holding or carrying this weapon, or if you fall unconscious, this effect ends.

features.name: Channel Divinity: Turn the Unholy
features.description: As an action, you present your holy symbol and speak a prayer censuring fiends and undead, using your Channel Divinity. Each fiend or undead that can see or hear you within 30 feet of you must make a Wisdom saving throw. If the creature fails its saving throw, it is turned for 1 minute or until it takes any damage. A turned creature must spend its turns trying to move as far away from you as it can, and it can't willingly move to a space within 30 feet of you. It also can't take reactions. For its action, it can only use the Dash action or try to escape from an effect that prevents it from moving. If there's nowhere to move, the creature can use the Dodge action.

features.name: Oath of Devotion
features.description: Chosen Path at Paladin Level 3

personalityTraits: Stoic and watchful, Xylos speaks rarely and only when necessary, preferring to communicate through actions and keen observation. They possess a primal connection to the wild, sensing shifts in nature with an almost animalistic instinct.
ideals: Balance: The world exists in a brutal, indifferent balance of life and death, predator and prey. Xylos seeks to maintain this sacred, often cruel, equilibrium against any who would upset it with artificial constructs or rampant destruction.
bonds: Xylos is bound to the Whispering Maw, an ancient, cavernous sinkhole on the surface, choked with primordial vegetation and strange, phosphorescent fungi, which they believe is a sacred conduit to the raw essence of the world.
flaws: Deep-seated mistrust of all civilization and its followers. Xylos struggles to comprehend laws and morals that deviate from the harsh, natural order, often acting with swift, unforgiving judgment against those perceived as disrupting it.

logbook.description: Rolled Grasping Thorns Damage: 4 (1d6) + 0 = 4
Casted Grasping Thorns
Leveled up to 3 (Paladin)! Max HP increased by 7.
Leveled up to 2 (Paladin)! Max HP increased by 7.
Xylos, The Rooted Shadow was born. A Level 1 Elf Paladin, Outlander background.

sorcery_points.name: Sorcery Points
sorcery_points.description: Fuel your metamagic and convert to/from spell slots.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: Cast sorcerer spells using Charisma.

features.name: Sorcerous Origin
features.description: Choose a sorcerous origin that shapes your innate magic.

features.name: Wild Magic Surge
features.description: Whenever you cast a sorcerer spell of 1st level or higher, the DM can have you roll on the Wild Magic Surge table immediately after. This can result in anything from a shower of flowers to a fireball erupting around you.

features.name: Tides of Chaos
features.description: You can gain advantage on one attack roll, ability check, or saving throw. Once you do so, you must finish a long rest before you can use it again, unless the DM has you roll on the Wild Magic Surge table first.

features.name: Font of Magic
features.description: Sorcery points = sorcerer level. Convert between spell slots and sorcery points.

features.name: Metamagic
features.description: Twist spells to suit your needs with metamagic options.

logbook.description: Rolled Acid Splash Damage: 2 (1d6) + 0 = 2
Casted Acid Splash
Casted Color Spray
Leveled up to 3 (Sorcerer)! Max HP increased by 3.
Leveled up to 2 (Sorcerer)! Max HP increased by 3.
Dr Orpheus was born. A Level 1 Human Sorcerer, Noble background.

name: Bimble 'Fizzy' Fimblewick

customSpells.name: Squeaky Clean Scrub
customSpells.description: You conjure a burst of effervescent, magically charged suds that clean a 5-foot cube area of any non-magical grime, dirt, or stains. The area is left sparkling and faintly scented of brine and lemon. This spell has no effect on magical substances or living creatures.

customSpells.name: Perfect Patty Press
customSpells.components: V, S, M (a pinch of salt and pepper)
customSpells.description: You touch a small portion of raw, edible material (up to 1 lb.) and magically shape it into a perfectly uniform patty, sphere, or other simple form. The food is also seasoned to a basic, palatable degree, though not cooked. If the material is already prepared as a meal component, this spell can enhance its texture or presentation for 1 hour.

customSpells.name: Jellyfish Jaunt
customSpells.components: V, S, M (a small, transparent bell jar)
customSpells.description: You conjure a shimmering, translucent net made of magical energy that can be used to ensnare small creatures or objects. As part of casting this spell, you can make a ranged spell attack against a target within range. On a hit, a Small or smaller creature is restrained by the net for the duration. A creature can use its action to make a Strength (Athletics) check against your spell save DC to free itself. You can also use this net to safely scoop up a delicate object weighing no more than 10 pounds and move it up to 30 feet.

inventory.name: Jar of Luminous Jellyfish Jelly
inventory.description: A small glass jar filled with a thick, pulsating jelly that glows with a faint, bioluminescent light. It's rumored to be delicious on toast, but Bimble primarily uses it as a portable, if sticky, light source.

inventory.name: Waterlogged Songbook
inventory.description: A small, leather-bound songbook, its pages slightly swollen and warped from repeated exposure to damp environments. It contains cheerful, nonsensical ditties and recipes for the most outlandish of dishes, many scribbled in the margins.

head.name: Coral-Encrusted Diving Goggles
head.description: Well-worn goggles with thick, clear glass lenses, framed by a lightweight, naturally porous coral. They provide surprisingly clear vision underwater and protect the eyes from splashes of boiling oil or harsh brine.

chest.name: Stained Chef's Tunic
chest.description: A thick canvas tunic, bleached white but bearing countless faint, mysterious stains from culinary experiments. It's surprisingly robust and offers minor protection, embroidered with a tiny, smiling seahorse crest.

mainHand.name: Gnome-Crafted Fry-Spatula
mainHand.description: A sturdy, well-oiled iron spatula with a sharpened edge and a surprisingly balanced coral handle. It's designed for flipping the most stubborn of patties but makes for a surprisingly effective (if unconventional) bladed weapon.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: Cast wizard spells using Intelligence.

features.name: Arcane Recovery
features.description: Recover spell slots during a short rest. Levels = half wizard level (rounded up).

personalityTraits: Unflappably optimistic, Bimble possesses boundless energy for his craft, often bursting into song or a high-pitched, infectious giggle at the slightest provocation.
ideals: Joy: True happiness comes from perfecting one's craft, sharing the simplest of pleasures, and finding wonder in every corner of the world, no matter how small or damp.
bonds: The dilapidated, yet somehow magically resilient 'Pineapple Pantry' where he meticulously perfects his bizarre, delicious concoctions and stores his ever-growing collection of aquatic ingredients.
flaws: Terribly naive and trusts almost everyone he meets, believing in the inherent goodness of all creatures, even those clearly malicious. Easily distracted by unique flora, fauna, or a particularly shiny pebble.

spells.name: Squeaky Clean Scrub
spells.description: You conjure a burst of effervescent, magically charged suds that clean a 5-foot cube area of any non-magical grime, dirt, or stains. The area is left sparkling and faintly scented of brine and lemon. This spell has no effect on magical substances or living creatures.

spells.name: Perfect Patty Press
spells.components: V, S, M (a pinch of salt and pepper)
spells.description: You touch a small portion of raw, edible material (up to 1 lb.) and magically shape it into a perfectly uniform patty, sphere, or other simple form. The food is also seasoned to a basic, palatable degree, though not cooked. If the material is already prepared as a meal component, this spell can enhance its texture or presentation for 1 hour.

spells.components: V, S, M (a small, transparent bell jar)
spells.description: You conjure a shimmering, translucent net made of magical energy that can be used to ensnare small creatures or objects. As part of casting this spell, you can make a ranged spell attack against a target within range. On a hit, a Small or smaller creature is restrained by the net for the duration. A creature can use its action to make a Strength (Athletics) check against your spell save DC to free itself. You can also use this net to safely scoop up a delicate object weighing no more than 10 pounds and move it up to 30 feet.

items.description: A sturdy, well-oiled iron spatula with a sharpened edge and a surprisingly balanced coral handle. It's designed for flipping the most stubborn of patties but makes for a surprisingly effective (if unconventional) bladed weapon.

items.name: Stained Chef's Tunic
items.description: A thick canvas tunic, bleached white but bearing countless faint, mysterious stains from culinary experiments. It's surprisingly robust and offers minor protection, embroidered with a tiny, smiling seahorse crest.

items.name: Coral-Encrusted Diving Goggles
items.description: Well-worn goggles with thick, clear glass lenses, framed by a lightweight, naturally porous coral. They provide surprisingly clear vision underwater and protect the eyes from splashes of boiling oil or harsh brine.

items.name: Jar of Luminous Jellyfish Jelly
items.description: A small glass jar filled with a thick, pulsating jelly that glows with a faint, bioluminescent light. It's rumored to be delicious on toast, but Bimble primarily uses it as a portable, if sticky, light source.

items.name: Waterlogged Songbook
items.description: A small, leather-bound songbook, its pages slightly swollen and warped from repeated exposure to damp environments. It contains cheerful, nonsensical ditties and recipes for the most outlandish of dishes, many scribbled in the margins.

logbook.description: Bimble 'Fizzy' Fimblewick was born. A Level 1 Gnome Wizard, Folk Hero background.

spells.name: Jellyfish Jaunt
spells.components: V, S, M (a small, transparent bell jar)
spells.description: You conjure a shimmering, translucent net made of magical energy that can be used to ensnare small creatures or objects. As part of casting this spell, you can make a ranged spell attack against a target within range. On a hit, a Small or smaller creature is restrained by the net for the duration. A creature can use its action to make a Strength (Athletics) check against your spell save DC to free itself. You can also use this net to safely scoop up a delicate object weighing no more than 10 pounds and move it up to 30 feet.

items.name: Gnome-Crafted Fry-Spatula
items.description: A sturdy, well-oiled iron spatula with a sharpened edge and a surprisingly balanced coral handle. It's designed for flipping the most stubborn of patties but makes for a surprisingly effective (if unconventional) bladed weapon.

items.name: Stained Chef's Tunic
items.description: A thick canvas tunic, bleached white but bearing countless faint, mysterious stains from culinary experiments. It's surprisingly robust and offers minor protection, embroidered with a tiny, smiling seahorse crest.

items.name: Coral-Encrusted Diving Goggles
items.description: Well-worn goggles with thick, clear glass lenses, framed by a lightweight, naturally porous coral. They provide surprisingly clear vision underwater and protect the eyes from splashes of boiling oil or harsh brine.

items.name: Jar of Luminous Jellyfish Jelly
items.description: A small glass jar filled with a thick, pulsating jelly that glows with a faint, bioluminescent light. It's rumored to be delicious on toast, but Bimble primarily uses it as a portable, if sticky, light source.

items.name: Waterlogged Songbook
items.description: A small, leather-bound songbook, its pages slightly swollen and warped from repeated exposure to damp environments. It contains cheerful, nonsensical ditties and recipes for the most outlandish of dishes, many scribbled in the margins.

logbook.description: Bimble 'Fizzy' Fimblewick was born. A Level 1 Gnome Wizard, Folk Hero background.
